title: Lupine Gaze x Fresh Animations
description: Makes wolves pretty✨✨👁👄👁💅 , but with Fresh Animations
body:
This resource pack enables compatibility with the [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) resource pack when playing with the [LupineGaze](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lupinegaze).

To use it, simply place this pack above the default Fresh Animations pack in the resource packs list!
